reviews.name: places/ChIJC_rebjFJK4cR5T1zy8kzb7A/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kUFpGbG9VWFpZZG5SZmJTMXRPR1ZqZG5ZelVrRRAB
reviews.text:
Not sure where to start because there are so many good things to say about Main Street Medical.

Responsive, check. Professional, check. Great communication and service by the medical provider Jennifer Herrera, check mate!

The front office staff consisting of Emily and Maria are a great team.  They are courteous, professional and responsive.  If I ever had a public facing businesses, I would hire these two and double their salary.  These two really keep the office machine moving forward successfully. Whoever hired these two should get a raise.

Jennifer Herrera is the medical provider and in my opinion, second to none. Her strong point is not just her medical education, experience and skills, but she communicates like no other.  She listens well, gives you her opinion and then treatment options.  Schools don’t teach the bed side manner Jennifer has when dealing with patients. Yes she is that good!  I don’t see myself ever leaving Main Street Medical.  They are my new go-to medical providers.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Dr. Watters and the team at Advanced Men's Performance. I had been struggling with my weight and energy levels for years, and nothing seemed to work. Dr. Watters listened carefully to my concerns and put together a plan that was completely tailored to my needs.

In just a few months, I’ve lost weight, regained my energy, and feel better than I have in years. I think what really sets Dr. Watters apart is his genuine care for his patients. He’s always available to answer my questions and makes me feel like I’m his top priority.

If you're looking to take control of your health and well-being, I highly recommend Dr. Watters. I’ve never felt more confident in my body and my future!

reviews.text: Dr. Surkunte and her team have been absolutely amazing! reviews.name: places/ChIJY3dhvISsK4cR0DmGy1T4FwU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKVlYzUmZXRVZQY0daYWEwMDNkbWd4Y1ZWbWRXYxAB
reviews.text:
My first time trying the pellets and simply it has been a game changer..

I was experiencing several symptoms of getting a bit older, more tired, less energy, after seeing Dr. S and coming up with a plan to meet my goals. I had my first pellets end of last year.

The process is super fast and simple, you get some blood work, see a urologist, then get pelleting , its a super quick , entirely out of office procedure, mild discomfort, and i was able to workout within a couple of days,

As for results: I started to see results with-in the first week or so, I work out all of the time, the results in the gym and for my fitness goals have been outstanding, i am lifting more now then i have before,  i have been both building muscle and reducing my total fat % (you still do have to work out). My sleep has been better, more confident.

Side effects: minimal...

will i do it again!? 100%%%

reviews.text:
My experience has been good and the products they provide are very helpful.
The phlebotomist, Linda, is the best!

My only concern is that the customer service is lacking. Little things like smiling, eye contact, talking at a volume where I can hear what you are saying, need improvement.

The prepayment protocol does not make a customer feel valued. It’s like you are punishing me for other people’s actions. It also seems like a money grab for the business.

All that being said, I will continue to use Balance Hormones for their products and convenience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3OLAVABK4cRQgZ3c3e3Pag/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ZelJHcENXSE5HVVhGMk1XbE5hVVZJYm1KYU1IYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Rago and his front desk staff are very friendly and welcoming. Dr. Rago himself is very knowledgeable and communicative. He described in great detail how my labs read in a way that made sense to me. I learned a lot about my body emotionally and physically in just one visit. I have already recommended him to many friends and family!

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3OLAVABK4cRQgZ3c3e3Pag/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aTFVDMU5jRXhxVEcxV1RrRlJabGx4WVdZd1RVRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Rago is extremely knowledgeable and friendly, however, his office staff struggles to communicate effectively, offer genuine concern and be solution focused. I’ve been on doctor prescribed TRT for years but transferred my care to Balance around 4 months ago when I moved to the area. I had my first follow up appointment with Dr. Rago scheduled for a few days before my out of town wedding. There were quite a few loose ends that I needed to take care of prior to the wedding so I had to reschedule my appt with Balance to be on 10/30 instead of the originally planned 10/22, pushed out just 8 days. They asked me on Monday 10/20 if I had my labs done and I sent them a picture of me waiting in the lobby of the lab. I got my blood drawn in advance of the appt and had my results in the online portal on 10/21 meaning Balance had the results as well. They had results a day prior to my scheduled appt, if this were to be considered “too late” they could have let me known in the many communications that we had. Never did.

Here’s where the problem is though - my medication was due for a refill on 10/23 and I started the refill process through my pharmacy on 10/16. After the pharmacy didn’t get a response from Balance to the refill request, I reached out to Balance on 10/18 to ask if anything was needed from me - they just said that they were “waiting on the doctor”. No problem. I continue to follow up as time goes on and keep getting the same “waiting on the doctor” response. It’s now 10/23, *a full week later* and the refill prescription still hasn’t been sent to my pharmacy on file. Frustrated, I ask yet again if anything is needed from me and only then do they finally say that “it’s because my appt was ‘cancelled’ that they aren’t able to send a refill and that me ‘cancelling’ my appt made me non-compliant…”. Just to be clear, my appointment was not cancelled, it was RESCHEDULED to be just 8 days later after I was back from wedding.

No one at the office let me know when I rescheduled my appt that it would cause such a headache in getting a refill. For an entire week the medical assistants at this office just said that they were waiting on the doctor, never mentioning that they were really withholding my medication as a result of the appt being rescheduled. It wasn’t until Thursday, the day that I was leaving for my wedding, that they offered to send in a one week’s supply to my pharmacy but it was already too late - it wouldn’t have been filled in time. Their failure to take have any sort of urgency caused me to miss my next injections. It should never take an entire week for a medication refill nor should you give patients excuses for an entire week either. With this being a controlled substance you can’t request a refill through the pharmacy until a week before you’re out of medication so even though I requested a refill as soon as it was possible, them dragging their feet for a week like this caused me to entirely run out of medication and miss my injections.

Again, Dr. Rago is great but the office staff here really drops the ball with their lack of communication. I should have been told when I rescheduled my appt that it would cause issues or at the very least have been told this when I first asked about the refill request. It shouldn’t have taken an entire week for them to tell the truth. There are tons of hormone clinics out there and I’ll be finding a new one who actually knows how to effectively communicate and have a sense of care for their patients. Would not recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJEzfRbjyrK4cRRXzdW8vinIw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGQ1ExbzFiVTVITTFZM01qbFdTRVJmWlhvMVFWRRAB
reviews.text:
I had a free TRT consultation at Men’s Health Chandler in September, and I couldn’t have been more impressed. NP Rachel was incredibly professional—she took the time to thoroughly answer all my questions and made sure I felt comfortable throughout the process. I never felt rushed or pressured, and there was absolutely no sales pitch or aggressive marketing.

After doing my own research, I ultimately chose this location because of the outstanding staff. Javen and Cole are both friendly, knowledgeable, and provide exceptional customer service.

The office is spotless and welcoming, with complimentary snacks, drinks, and sports on TV while you wait.

I’ve now started my treatment and feel confident that I made the right choice!

reviews.text: I got to Gameday because of Mark he gets his haircut at our barbershop. I went in for the free consultation with levels being checked. I have been on it now for 8 months now and I feel fantastic. I’m a 48 year old male and the staff is so amazing Cole / Angelique / Javen and Rachel are all so supportive and awesome to work with. Come here and get yourself feeling great again. I had very low Testosterone after about 2 weeks I had a ton of energy and my libido is way high like I’m in my early 20s do this and you won’t regret it

reviews.name: places/ChIJEzfRbjyrK4cRRXzdW8vinIw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pNeFJqQTVjMGRRVkRFMVVXaFRiSFY2V1ZKR05YYxAB
reviews.text:
I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the exceptional service and professional expertise demonstrated by several members of your team.

Specifically, I would like to commend JoJo and Javen. Their welcoming demeanor and profound knowledge were truly outstanding, providing a comforting and informative environment. Their comprehensive understanding of the products offered was a decisive factor in my decision to choose this clinic.

Furthermore, Sammy and Trey consistently exhibited remarkable professionalism and a high level of proficiency in their respective areas. Their competence significantly contributes to the overall positive experience at your facility.

The caliber of your staff, particularly those individuals I've mentioned, is a primary reason I wholeheartedly recommend this location. In a therapeutic setting, the importance of knowledgeable and skilled professionals cannot be overstated. This establishment, thanks to its dedicated employees, unequivocally meets and exceeds those crucial requirements.

reviews.text: Well started out promising but I don’t think they know how to handle concerns and issues. I asked to switch providers for my next visit to Joy because with the other provider I have felt dismissed about the reactions I am getting every time (we are talking severe bruising and pain for weeks after insertion) well I called today (this morning) because I am 5 weeks out from insertion and have swelling, some pain and you can feel the pellet at the site (hard as a rock). I was told a provider would call me today to discuss what I should do. Yep no one called me. I was very firm this morning about how bad it felt and that it wasn’t normal. So I guess I try again in the morning but most likely will not continue at this practice.

reviews.text: I came in at an all time low in confidence after I tore my meniscus for the second time. I had two opinions already and was fearing another surgery in my future. Carter has been the best thing that’s ever happened to my physical pain and knee pain that’s come from years of overdoing it on the tennis court. They specialize in regenerative medicine and my results have been outstanding. I’m well onto my way to recovery, not to mention a precision draining of my meniscal cyst that came from the tear. Literally everything related to my knees has gotten better since coming here. I will never go anywhere else for knee issues and advise anyone else do the same.

reviews.name: places/ChIJF6zoETkHK4cRCD56hbiF1FU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJcnRmOGpRRRAB
reviews.text: The staff at Optimize U is bar none the most knowledgeable about hormones, weight loss, and overall health optimization. I am a fan of optimization and performance. I’ve never felt so revitalized! I have to agree with their slogan that “normal is not optimal”. Don’t let your doctor tell you otherwise. Get a blood draw and the Optimize U staff will optimize YOU!

reviews.name: places/ChIJF6zoETkHK4cRCD56hbiF1FU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmNDVETGtRRRAB
reviews.text: Optimize U has changed my life!  Leslie is committed to health and your well-being and genuinely cares about her patients.  With her help, I have succeeded in taking off 30 pounds in the past year, get in better shape, eat better and feel amazing!  I fit into clothes I never imagined I would ever fit into again.  (They are actually too big!!!)  I feel a night and day difference from last year this time when I was at my highest weight and felt terrible...  I am so much more confident.  Leslie is supportive and she doesn't give up on you.  Optimize U is the most reasonably priced place I have found in the valley, too.  If you are looking to change your life for the absolute better,  don't hesitate to make an appointment.

reviews.text: Doctors are great! Unfortunately the front desk is not very friendly and does not communicate well. They failed to inform me of out of pocket fees for additional injections recommended by doctor that insurance did not cover. They also try and argue with you if you have met your out of pocket co-pays for the year and try and get you to pay the deductible. Suggestion: listen to the patients! Also it would be nice if they would open a little earlier to allow people to get to work on time! They will not open the doors until 8am on the dot even with people waiting outside the door. Customer service needs work.

reviews.name: places/ChIJhSN5V7kAK4cRwlGTmuZih7I/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4OHAzWk5BEAE
reviews.text:
I called to see if I could transfer my testosterone replacement therapy from my existing doctor only to find Vital4Men is offering what appears to be what I would consider an overpriced boutique testosterone replacement service. Perhaps it was an ill informed receptionist quoting me bad info, but it appears this business prays on people who are not familiar with hormone replacement therapy options, or its typical cost. Personally I just wanted to see if they would provide a higher level of care than my existing physician but based on what the receptionist told me its a consult, blood draw and then a weekly visit for testosterone injections, with the option of taking a few weeks supply home for personal injections at a weekly cost that is about 3-4X more expensive than my existing therapy and a lot less convenient since I have to visit their office constantly.

To put things into perspective the out of pocket cost for a three month supply of Testosterone injections is only around 130$ out of pocket with no insurance, but vital4men quoted me around 30-40$ weekly and I could only obtain the prescriptions through them. They said I could also bring home a three or four week supply and do the injections myself so I dont need to visit an office so frequently. I suppose some could feel squeamish by the process of administering it testosterone themselves, but it's something most people can do with little risk after some in training and guidance. Personally I would rather bring home a three months supply and administer the hormon myself. Steer clear of unless you are looking for a concierge TRT service with a hefty middle man mark up as a result. My recommendation for most people is to simply find a good traditional general physician or endocrinologist covered by your insurance plan to guide your TRT.

Ellie, Anne, & Scott are my usual rotation of my weekly visits and they are the best, I can bring any question or concern and they give honest and tremendously helpful feedback or guidance. reviews.text:
Better than any conventional doctor checkup, with or without insurance.
The staff here is always on point and treats you like a person, not a number, from the moment you walk in. You’re greeted by Tonia’s beautiful smile, and every member of the team — Anne, Piikea, Scott, Ellie, Michaela, and Tarah — provides top-notch care with honest, unbiased conversations about how to help you feel and function at your best. Thank you all for your dedication and professionalism. There are many options in the medical field, but I choose you for a reason. Sometimes it’s not just about medicine, the staff makes the place. You have the full package. Keep up the great work!

reviews.text: Absolutely love the providers but front desk and manager are unprofessional. Had an appointment rescheduled because of unforeseen circumstances. Had to wait for rescheduled appointment 3 and a half months. Called and confirmed month in advance since I needed to add services. Appoitment was there and additional service was added to it. One day before rescheduled appointment got no notification. Called to confirm and was told no appointment was ever on the books. Next available is another 4 months wait. Imagine my disappointment, but staff I talked to sounded like I have no reason to be upset since they were trying to help me. How is it even possible that they can’t see if it ever was scheduled? They saw it prior. Next available appointment over 7 months since the day I had to cancel original appointment. Very unfortunate that I have to leave a good provider due to incompetence of the front staff and management. Staff was talking over me because I was not listening to their help. How is it helpful in any way to me not being able to see my provider for over 7 months from original cancellation? Mistake was on their end not mine. No acceptable solution was offered.

reviews.text: Limitless TRT, is the best place to go for all things health and beauty. The entire staff is amazing, very friendly and helpful. It’s very personalized care. All my labs have improved since going to Limitless. I look forward to the continued improvement and success!

reviews.name: places/ChIJD0wk5Z-tK4cRO7yM_xpIQVY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSSlJrUlRkbnBSTUhZd05GaE5kVXBUWlVwSllYYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been a patient at Limitless TRT and Aesthetics in Gilbert for about six months for women’s hormone replacement therapy, and I truly can’t say enough good things about the team and the experience.

One of the unexpected highlights for me has been their EMF electromagnetic frequency chair for pelvic floor strengthening. I was honestly a little skeptical at first — but after using it, I noticed improvement almost immediately. It’s incredibly easy to use. You literally just sit on the chair fully clothed for about 30 minutes and scroll on your phone while it does the work.

Since starting sessions, I’ve had noticeable improvements in bladder control, frequency, and urgency. It’s one of those things you don’t realize how much it impacts your quality of life until it gets better.

The staff is knowledgeable, supportive, and never pushy. They make everything feel comfortable and straightforward. If you’re considering hormone therapy or are even remotely curious about improving your pelvic floor strength, I highly recommend checking them out. It’s been such a positive experience for me.

reviews.text: Optimal Female Wellness has changed my life! Yvonne is so dedicated and exudes passion, knowledge, and expertise, guiding you every step of the way towards your goals. Thank you for guiding me on this incredible path towards a happier, healthier me!

reviews.name: places/ChIJdb1wdw1HK4cR5SzoA-yTumw/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMdEpENW1nRRAB
reviews.text: The menopause journey can be overwhelming.  Finding a clinical professional who really understands the complexities and treatment options is rare.  Women do not need to feel marginalized by those clinical professionals who continue to minimizing the vast symptoms as normal or "just hot flashes."  I have found Optimal Female Wellness under Dr. Yvonne Downs refreshing and empowering. Her approach offers both emotional and physical support.  She is comforting and reassuring.  Dr. Downs listened to understand my individual needs and customized a treatment plan unique to me, providing improved health holistically.  THANK YOU!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-QNjuNilK4cRC2bgckyDtBU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toYWVXdHBRbWR5UkZsMFl6Rm5URUoyYlRScVpIYxAB
reviews.text:
Men’s Health North Mesa was an exceptional experience from the moment I walked in. I was welcomed by medical assistants Bianca Gutierrez and Zoe Sears, both of whom showed genuine hospitality and professionalism.

Zoe Sears, in particular, stood out. She guided the entire visit with calm confidence, explained everything clearly, and made the process incredibly smooth. She carried herself with the kind of professionalism that makes you feel taken care of, respected, and in good hands. Her attention to detail and her ability to make the appointment quick and effortless truly set the standard.

I appreciate the entire team for their outstanding service, and I genuinely look forward to returning. Thank you for the exceptional care and the environment you create!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7YS4bISxK4cRiZQ_SAcibdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1ZmIwNXVNbmxvZURaMU9FcE5WRUZVVGs0NFdXYxAB
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about LoveJoy . I’ve been going there for a couple years after going to a different practice for a few years prior. The treatment plan and prices are always consistent here, which I have not experienced elsewhere. The staff is absolutely amazing. Great experience every time. If you’re new to HRT, start here. They take the time to explain everything and do routine bloodwork.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7YS4bISxK4cRiZQ_SAcibdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25RMVZtMXJURTkzUlZoNWVFUmpYM28zZVhoa2FIYxAB
reviews.text: I’m not sure how many years I have been coming here, but I first came to Joy when she was at another hormone clinic, which I believe was in 2008, then followed her here when she started Love Joy Clinic.  I moved to Utah in 20222 and I still fly here, Mesa, to her clinic for my pellet.  So with that being said, you might rightfully assume I LOVE Joy and her staff at both clinics!  I would recommend hormone replacement for any woman or man who seeks optimal health, a fabulous sex drive and the same energy you had in your 20’s, 30’s and 40’s.  I’m 63 years old and I modestly tell you, people always compliment me on my appearance and youthful energy .  I highly recommend this product and these wonderful people at Love Joy!!  This is my most recent photo with my daughter who told me I’m finally going to be a grandma!  This photo is not edited or photoshopped at all.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7YS4bISxK4cRiZQ_SAcibdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxa1NWZGtkbUY0WkVSaWFWQlNPVFZmUjJsUVVFRRAB
reviews.text: Been using them for years and can’t say enough good things about the staff and  practitioner Debbie Bartine. Well cared for, feeling my best as an almost 54 year old female (hello menopause), and worth every penny! Highly recommend you run to see her if you are dealing with any of the typical symptoms many women experience at this age. All natural and safe and I’m living proof that you can feel amazing going through this tough phase of life!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7YS4bISxK4cRiZQ_SAcibdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25BM0xVRnhOWEJCZUdkeFpHY3lWMGhxTmkxYVVFRRAB
reviews.text: There are no words to describe how wonderful the ladies are at Love Joy! I feel fabulous and the  compassion and care this staff gives is over the top! Quality of life is so important , so there is absolutely no reason to not give hormone therapy a try. They will take the best care of you and you will not believe how good you can feel.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7YS4bISxK4cRiZQ_SAcibdw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Oa2RqVkpkR3cxTW5odlJHNUtSMEYxUnpsb09GRRAB
reviews.text: I have just started at love joy. The customer service is amazing. Everyone treats you like family , they truly care about you as a patient and want to help! I would recommend them to everyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFeRX1rGxK4cRLzgQ-IO9__8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ORVRsTjNTbUZIVDNkNWVtaEZiRTV6Vm5GWE4wRRAB
reviews.text:
If you're looking for a place that combines professionalism with a genuinely welcoming atmosphere, Mesa TRT is the place to be! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with such warmth and positivity. The whole vibe of the clinic is top notch, from its super clean, modern, and inviting space to the amazing people who work there.

But what truly stood out was Malory. Wow! I’ve had my fair share of treatments before, but nothing compares to the level of care and attention Malory provided as the face of the company. She is incredibly knowledgeable, down to earth, and made me feel comfortable throughout the entire process.

The team at Mesa TRT really knows how to create a positive, encouraging, and rejuvenating environment. The whole clinic radiates cleanliness and care, which made me feel confident in every step of my treatment. You can tell they put so much thought into every detail both in their space and in their service.

I am so happy with my results and can’t recommend Mesa TRT enough. Malory and the entire team are absolutely incredible. If you're on the fence about trying TRT or just looking for a top tier experience, don't hesitate. This place is the real deal!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFeRX1rGxK4cRLzgQ-IO9__8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNncmZHcnBBRRAB
reviews.text: Awesome experience! All of the staff were highly professional and knowledgeable. The Nurse Practitioner Sarah spent a extensive amount of time answering all my questions and reviewing my free labs. Cole, the owner, guided me through the whole experience. There were no gimmicks or pressure. Highly recommended! Check them out!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFeRX1rGxK4cRLzgQ-IO9__8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VLLTg4OW1uX29xN2FBEAE
reviews.text: Cole and the team at Game Day in Mesa are phenomenal, from the initial consultation to the on-going treatments they are efficient and effective. If you’re on the fence on who to see for TRT, do your homework, read the reviews, get off the fence and get into their office… you’ll thank me later!

reviews.name: places/ChIJFeRX1rGxK4cRLzgQ-IO9__8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbTlmS2NBEAE
reviews.text: I love Mesa TRT, and this entire group. I have never felt so personally attended to at a doctor's office. I felt heard, and helped in every aspect. I have also watched them create a place of help and healing with other patients, and my husband is now a happy client as well. I recommend this place to everyone I come across who has some kind of health issue. Five stars, easy. Would give more if it let me.

reviews.name: places/ChIJFeRX1rGxK4cRLzgQ-IO9__8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaZ29LZE1BEAE
reviews.text: As an active Mom, I had started feeling run down and always felt tired. I decided to have my hormones checked and am SO happy with Mesa TRT. They are friendly, knowledgeable and answered all my questions when starting hormone replacement with them. For women, there were multiple options and all were explained in great detail. I get my prescription mailed directly to my door monthly, which is super convenient! I have energy to keep up with my kiddo, have gained muscle at the gym and am focused on life!

reviews.name: places/ChIJyVZa9Y6xK4cRtbbHHRlS3G4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cE9ub2ZBEAE
reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough of the professionalism and compassion I received from Southwest Family Medical. Starting from my first phone call, I felt comfortable and well-informed about my treatment plan.

Mallory was incredibly attentive and thorough. She took the time to explain every step and answered all my questions with patience and clarity. She consistently checked in on me and made sure I had everything i needed.

Daisy was very professional and had a warm and friendly approach when going over my blood work and helping me understand what it all means.

Together, Mallory and Daisy provided exceptional care that went above and beyond my expectations. Their teamwork and dedication to patient well-being are truly commendable. I am greatful for their support and highly recommend them to anyone in need of their care.

reviews.text: Good morning, this is Randi and I wanted to let you know what a fabulous night I had. I have absolutely no discomfort from where the pellets were placed. I wouldn't even know that they are there! I used the ice for the first couple of hours but truly I didn't really need to. Normally I would be crying right now because I'm so happy but I really don't feel the need to cry. I can just be happy without the tears. Isn't that just amazing! So thank you so much! I look forward to a lifetime relationship with Lovejoy! Ps I was just in the office yesterday and already my first night. All these positive things I wish I'd been there years ago!

reviews.text:

This clinic is nice looking and clean and has an IV room.

Within just a few hours after my visit, I felt a noticeable improvement in my energy levels and overall symptoms.

I recommend AMAVA to anyone looking for a good IV infusion, TRT or just looking for personalized care and effective treatments. The results speak for themselves! My wife got an IV with me and also says she feels great.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS8m7Wt5DK4cRecdQ2hn4STY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQLWNpNXd3RRAB
reviews.text: After wasting three months at another clinic, I came to AMAVA Regenerative Medicine for weight loss. The clinic’s atmoshpere is super welcoming and has made this journey enjoyable. With 20 pounds left to reach my goal, I am confident that with AMAVA’s support, I will get there before I know it. I couldn’t be happier with my progress and highly recommend the clinic and provider to anyone looking for effective weight loss solutions. Aneta is the nurse practitioner at the clinic and is consistent with my follow ups and comprehensive assessments which allows me to track my body composition and weightloss monthly and let’s me see real results! This place gave me the boost to make the lifestyle change I needed to make - highly recommend them!

reviews.text: I have always been an extremely active person but when I reached my late 50s into 60s I could tell I was slowing down and lacked energy to do the things I loved. After talking with a good friend about testosterone injections I decided to seek out help.  Anika and Tina Lisa were the gals I turned to for help.  They put me on testosterone therapy and it has completely improved my life.  I now have energy to do all the things I enjoy in life.  No side effects, no issues, no worries, just happiness. 😀

reviews.name: places/ChIJc5AMCKENK4cRG3GXLoVmSwU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pObldtRmtRbXRqVUVselNIYzNYMnhSUm1KTlRsRRAB
reviews.text:
As a recently retired father and grandfather, staying active has always been central to my life. But after cancer surgery and gradual weight gain, even my regular cycling and cross-country skiing weren’t enough to bring my weight down. Diets didn’t help, and my energy was fading.

When I decided to try Tirzepatide, my wife and I set the goal of reducing our BMIs below 25. To my amazement, I reached that goal in only 26 days. The injections were simple, comfortable, and easy to administer, and the only side effect I experienced was mild occasional heartburn, which resolved quickly.

Over time, I lost 13 kg (28.3 lbs) in total and returned to a BMI of 24. My workouts felt easier, skiing became effortless, and I regained the vitality I thought I had lost for good. With maintenance dosing, keeping the weight off has been straightforward.

Tirzepatide has been a fast, safe, and truly life-changing solution for me, and I am deeply grateful for the renewed health and confidence it brought back into my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJc5AMCKENK4cRG3GXLoVmSwU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xObFpHWnZTWEpUYUhkWmRrMTBTbUp6VTFVM2VHYxAB
reviews.text: I was skeptical at first, but contacting Activ8 was one of the best decisions I have made. I started my Tirzepatide journey in Mid-October on a smaller dose and have lost 10 steadily! Aside from changes on the scale, I have more energy, less inflammation, and overall feeling more confident in myself. I have only had mild side effects, but have been able to manage as the weeks go on. I am extremely happy with the results so far, and excited to continue!

reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about my experience at Ageless Male! I came in for a B12 shot and an IV hydration drip, and Tyson took incredible care of me from start to finish. He was super knowledgeable, answered all my questions, made me feel completely at ease (I’m usually nervous about needles), and the whole process was quick and basically painless. The clinic is spotless, the vibe is welcoming, and I left feeling energized and refreshed. Tyson genuinely cares about his patients and it shows. If you’re thinking about TRT, wellness shots, or IV therapy, this is the place to go. Highly recommend Tyson and the whole Ageless Male team!

reviews.text:
Ageless Men’s Health has been truly exceptional. After experiencing low energy and related symptoms for several years, I finally decided to schedule an evaluation and have my testosterone levels checked. The results showed that my levels were relatively low and that I was a good candidate for TRT.

Six months into treatment, my energy has significantly improved, and my workouts are once again producing noticeable results. The entire team has been outstanding—Aleina always provides a warm and welcoming greeting upon arrival, and both Tyson and Kaley are extremely knowledgeable. Their expertise in TRT, as well as other health topics we discuss, has been invaluable.

I highly recommend Ageless Men’s Health to anyone considering TRT or looking to improve their overall well-being.

reviews.text: Dr. K is an outstanding functional medicine doctor. I have seen him for about 10 years now, moved out of state 5 years ago and have continued care under him remotely.  He is extremely knowledgeable, responsive, and goes above and beyond addressing questions or concerns.  He truly cares about the health and well being of his patients and has earned my complete trust over the years.  I would definitely recommend him to anyone searching for answers on how to feel better, get healthier naturally and increase your chances of living longer!

reviews.name: places/ChIJkc0X9MBsK4cRah21g7jfm3I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsM2EwOXhVRzFQWHpOdlgwMUVRbHAzVkhaVFRYYxAB
reviews.text:
Finally a Doctor who listens and delivers real results for my daughter complex health issues!
From our very first virtual consult (super convenient since we live about an hour away - his telemedicine option works anywhere), he took the time to dive deep into her full history, symptoms, and even lifestyle factors we hadn't considered. No rushing, no cookie-cutter plans—just thoughtful, personalized strategies that addressed the *why* behind her issues, not just the what.

After just a few months on his treatment plan, we've seen game-changing improvements: her energy levels are up, the gut pain has nearly vanished, and she even started working full-time; something that was impossible a few months ago.. For the first time in years, she's excited about activities she used to love, without the constant drag of feeling unwell. As a parent, it's heartbreaking to watch your child struggle, but Dr. Kilcup didn't just treat her—he empowered our whole family with education and tools to support her long-term wellness.

His office in Phoenix is welcoming and efficient, with a team that's kind and attentive.
If you're tired of dead-end appointments and ready for a doctor who actually cares about getting to the root of things, look no further. Dr. Kilcup isn't just skilled—he's compassionate, thorough, and genuinely invested in your success. He's the only one who's truly helped us, and we'll be forever grateful. Highly recommend to any family dealing with mysterious or chronic health problems.

Thank you Dr Kilcup and staff!
Sincerely the Lopezes

reviews.name: places/ChIJkc0X9MBsK4cRah21g7jfm3I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toWFVVeHdRVnBTWDNaVlEwOVNkVk5JZVhWRFMxRRAB
reviews.text: Dr.Kilcup and his team were amazing! Facility was well organized and kept clean. Staff was super friendly. With the Red light session your body is completely exposed to the red light head to toe, front to back. The HBOT was also amazing, with two options laying down or  sitting.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkc0X9MBsK4cRah21g7jfm3I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4VU9XaGlZVVpNY2tGbGFIQjZRMlJrV21kcWFsRRAB
reviews.text:
I spent about 10 years going specialist to speciality to figure out my growing fatigue, unexplained weight gain, uncontrollable migraines, and a few other things that just could not get solved!
A friend recommended going the functional medicine route, specifically here, and I said it is worth the try at this point! Is it a bit pricey? Yes - BUT - my husband keeps saying "what is the point of money and things if your health isn't letting you serve the Lord with them?" And that's a great way to put it.
There are so many women who have tried the traditional medicine route and are consistently told that their problems all come down to needing to take birth control, drink more water, exercise more, and just stress less. This is not supposed to be normal!
While, functional medicine is not an easy and quick solution, it is a healthy and long-term one that is worth every penny.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkc0X9MBsK4cRah21g7jfm3I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taemQzWTJNRFpUZGtZeVpuY3RTVXR3UVdSTlVHYxAB

Dr Kilcup took the time to talk to me and answer my questions! Would recommend this place!

reviews.name: places/ChIJn3rid6wTK4cRW-ghbAVgFrE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WbFRrMVVPR2hyUmpWVlltWnNlVVJZZFVkVFRGRRAB
reviews.text: I honestly love this place and I’m so grateful that I got recommended here. They have always been so amazing and so helpful, they always have an amazing attitude and I’ve never felt more comfortable. They really helped educate me on what’s happening and what’s going on. They also are very understanding and supportive, when my mother called and tried to get them to not accept me they called me and let me know and didn’t let that stop them from helping me. I love them and I recommend this place to everyone, I live in Tucson and it’s a 2 hour drive there and back but it’s so worth it and I’m happy to do it. They are also very affordable and that helps a lot especially right now.

reviews.name: places/ChIJn3rid6wTK4cRW-ghbAVgFrE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ocWVqaGxaREoyVEROb1VXTk9SbFYwU1Zjd1NtYxAB
reviews.text:
I have been coming here for around 2 years for HRT. I got my first injection the same day as my consultation. I love the flexibility of being able to do walk-ins for my injections!
They also have a a bunch of various resources for the LGBT community like inclusive therapists.
Most (if not all) of the staff is part of the community so they really understand.
I even found the surgeon I got top surgery with through a recommendation by a staff member here.
I couldn't imagine going anywhere else, thank you Micheal and all the lovely staff!

reviews.name: places/ChIJn3rid6wTK4cRW-ghbAVgFrE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKcFRETkxXVkp4WTFWalZtbEhhMkl0ZDNkU1FVRRAB
reviews.text:
Everyone is very kind and friendly here.
BUT it’s not very kind to your wallet.
As for someone who’s been on T for 8+ years now I was unhappy with my experience with identity. Let me explain,

They have their own treatment plan where they make you come weekly to get your shot which is very inconvenient. And they do not prescribe T out of the office. I have heard that you can get at home kit but you will pay an arm and a leg. (Look at Salt Lake City location review as well) one of their reviews explained almost everything I experienced.

For example, you are coming every week and being charged $56 without insurance and even with insurance you are still paying around $27-$35 weekly. So every month you are atleast spending almost close to $200+ (without insurance) just to get your care.  Like that’s insane

With my previous provider and plan I was paying $12 for my dose which is about 2 months supply of T.  (With insurance) that’s 4 vials of testosterone cypionate
I went from spending $6 a month for my T to almost $200+ with identity hormones treatment. (With insurance)

Their treatment plan might work to some, but I wouldn’t recommend. I feel like there are other places or resources out there that will be a lot friendlier to your Bank account.

reviews.name: places/ChIJn3rid6wTK4cRW-ghbAVgFrE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KclQzbEtZVkoyVDA0M1duWXdPRmh5VFhWNmRHYxAB
reviews.text:
I went to them for a little over three years and have had a few issues with them but nothing too serious. That was until November of 2025. Zach does not respect boundaries. I had a telehealth appointment set up with Michael as soon as the clinic opened because I couldn't be late for work. I had physically gone to the clinic the day before for my shot and to get a note because I had open wounds on my hand from scooter crash and just wanted something stating that I had to keep them covered so I could continue working even though I work a dirty job, and was told that was no issue before setting up the telehealth so Michael could see my hand himself. He called off the next day and Zach, who I've instructed in the past isn't allowed to deal with me because he stuck a needle into my leg sideways, and I felt it for weeks, was late for the scheduled time. Didn't message or communicate. Attempted to make me late for work to force the appointment when he finally started to respond to my messages. I didn't realize it was Zach at all because he never stated that. He just kept messaging my phone after I told him I couldn't do the appointment at that time, I had to get ready for work, that I was having a panic attack because I had lied to my boss because of them, I had stated I would have a note, and would message them later to reschedule.
He wouldn't stop texting me and tried to guilt trip me into missing work to have the appointment right then, because they were making accommodations for me to have the call before 9am, which was never told to me when they made the appointment.
I could only get him to stop messaging me by getting nasty, and that was turned against me. I was supposed to let him continue to message me and trigger panic attacks after I had communicated I was having a panic attack and would talk later, because they've been very accommodating in the past.
I haven't been back to the clinic once since this Incident and they haven't checked  in once. I haven't had my shot once since nov 10th. For three years I went here, they're fully aware of my different diagnosis, and they just wrote me off because I didn't let Zach continue to try and a push an interaction that he wasn't authorized to make in the first place. The appointment should have been cancelled when Michael called off, not passed to someone who wasn't supposed to handle anything to do with me. Instead I had to ultimately miss work and pay for an urgent care to look at my hand and write a note stating I needed to wear gloves at work so my job couldn't ignore it. I had to pay to see a therapist when I couldn't afford it to go over the messages. Because when I calmed down the following day they almost managed to gaslight me into thinking I did something wrong. My therapist ultimately stated she would be advising me to seek a different clinic after this interaction regardless of if I started going back myself because of how a licensed nurse refusing to aknowlegde a patient stating they were having a panic attack and needed space but instead tried to force the situation was very concerning. I have finally set up an appointment with a new clinic and hopefully will resume my shots at the end of February. But this place cost me damn near a thousand dollars between urgent care, therapy and missed work. I genuinely Don't advise going here if you struggle with panic attacks, suicidal ideation, ADHD, or autism. They won't even check on you when they know they caused a mental breakdown and they never see you again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJn3rid6wTK4cRW-ghbAVgFrE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3dG9xQTJBRRAB
reviews.text: I’d recommend this place above ANYWHERE else! The staff is absolutely amazing. I’ve never had any problems here. They make the process that can seem so intimidating, genuinely feel safe. They answer any questions quickly and accurately and are very mindful of your time. I work full time and am usually on a time crunch so it’s nice that I can always count on being in and out in 5 minutes! The staff has been a huge part in making this process so memorable and special! I’m 2 years on T and i’ve NEVER been happier!!!!!

reviews.text: I’m totally blown away by how much my body has changed after starting the EmSculpt Neo treatments at the Phoenix Anti-Aging Clinic! Competing in Miss Arizona, I needed that extra boost of confidence, and the body sculpting really delivered. I’ve had 6 sessions so far, treatments were done on my arms, abs, and glutes, and the difference is incredible. 🙏🏼 Focusing on my abs has not only strengthened my core but also improved my endurance during walk trainings. It’s even helped with my posture! I feel the strongest and most confident I’ve ever been. Definitely a 10/10 recommend for anyone looking to feel their best! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I have never met such a kind and truly caring doctor like her that really takes the time to listen to their patients the way she does.

reviews.text:
Julie Hinman at Soal Wellness truly cares about making a difference in healthcare. Her approach is not just about writing a prescription. reviews.name: places/ChIJzZQtb651K4cRaLDdvltyhE0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2MU1TMnhRRRAB
reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough about my experience with Ageless Men’s Health. From the moment I walk through the door, I’m greeted with exceptional customer service by the front desk team. They are always professional, friendly, make me laugh and always make me feel like a priority every single visit.

A special shout-out to P.A. Tres Kwilosz, whose vast knowledge and expertise are unmatched. He takes the time to listen, explain everything thoroughly, and ensure I understand every step of my care plan. It’s clear he is passionate about helping his patients feel their absolute best, and it shows in the results.

The care I receive here is unparalleled. Not only do I feel valued as a patient, but I genuinely feel like they go above and beyond to support my health and wellness goals. Since starting my journey with Ageless Men’s Health, I feel better than I ever have—energized, confident, and performing at my peak.

If you’re looking for a place that combines top-notch care with outstanding service, this is it. I can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.text:
I was a patient at the Chandler office for years but took a break from treatment, and during that time, I gained 30 pounds. My hormones were completely out of whack, and my PCP was only focused on masking the symptoms rather than addressing the root cause. I was miserable and knew something had to change.

That’s when I decided to restart my journey at the Scottsdale Balance Hormone Center and was asked to choose a provider. After reading Julie’s bio, I knew she was the right fit for me. Her extensive experience in the medical field gave me confidence that she would take a well-rounded approach to my care.

Julie is incredibly knowledgeable and thorough—she takes your blood work and shows you exactly where improvements need to be made. She explains everything in detail, making sure you understand your treatment plan. When I left my appointment, I felt completely satisfied and confident in my decision.

I had my first visit January 6, 2025 and today February 12, 2025 I’m down 16 pounds. I still have a long way to go, but I already feel so much better! Julie and the team at Balance Hormone Center have been amazing, and I’m beyond grateful for their support in helping me get my health back on track. Highly recommend!

Julie Osgood, NP is excellent she is always willing to take her time and I have never felt rushed! She is knowledgeable in her field and understands what we as women go through!! So, if you are feeling that post menopausal fatigue, Balance Hormone might have the answer!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2yCuvTZ1K4cR_X4lbWhT_FA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOUxuNm9BRRAB
reviews.text: It was truly a life changing experience to learn what is actually going on in my body rather than assuming that I think my life style is making a difference.  It confirmed many things I was doing well and opened my eyes in areas that needed some more serious change.  I feel more connected to my body that ever before.  I am now eating more protein based on my lean muscle mass, have made significant changes to my supplements to give my body more and less of what it needs, I have a better understanding of how to make the most out of my exercise routines based on my target heart rate goals, I am consuming less alcohol and have made huge strides is lowering my cortisol levels.  I would have never been motivated to make these changes had it not been for my experience with Cenegenics.  I have known about this program for two years and I kept putting it off.  I am glad I finally pulled the trigger as it has changed my health plan which will help me more quickly achieve my short and long term health goals.  The team was great.  Patient, informative and demonstrated a genuine care for me with no judgement.  Just a safe space to learn and grow.  Truly life changing and I am excited to see what I can create with my body and mind now that I have a team along side me to help elevate my performance in every aspect of my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2yCuvTZ1K4cR_X4lbWhT_FA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyaUkzc3NRRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Daniel and his team of professionals provided me with exceptional, expertise service.  I’ve always considered myself really healthy.  Dr. Daniel’s thorough examination reveal some critical areas I need to further investigate, that could be lifesaving. I appreciated his caring, professional staff, as well as their knowledge of health and wellness. An executive physical isn’t cheap. But neither is getting sick and having seriously poor health.

I have no regrets. I’ve spent way more money on far less important things than my health and wellness.  If you’re over 50 and care about your health,  I can’t emphasize enough the importance of seeing a Cenegenics-trained physician and their team of wellness professionals. It’s not the number of days in our life, but the amount of life in our days that matters.  I believe I just improved both.

An appointment with a wellness physician may save your life, and at the very least will help improve your quality of life, regardless of your current state of health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2yCuvTZ1K4cR_X4lbWhT_FA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbzhMeFh3EAE
reviews.text: The staff is really what makes the experience the greatest experience. I could have gone to a regular doctor to looked at. Cenegenics offers far more than just a regular evaluation, they provided me a real in-depth explanation of my test, they gave me the tools needed to change my future and quality of life. Also most of all, the motivational conversations  and encouragement is all I needed to leave with the most epic life changing  experiences of my life.  Thank you 🙏🏾

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2yCuvTZ1K4cR_X4lbWhT_FA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxaXYyZDJBRRAB
reviews.text:
Great experience!  This is the way to practice medicine.  Where else gives you 6 hrs of time with an Internist and a Nutritionist?!

When has your physician ever sat down with you and gone over your blood tests line by line, explained the recommended norms vs what they think the norm should be for you, and what you do to reach that norm?

Establishing a baseline for your bone density, body fat, muscle mass, symmetry, flexibility, stamina, stress test, health of your carotid arteries, an hour plus of nutritional counseling as well as training recommendations to optimize your baseline data.

This is health care designed to keep you healthy!  Rather than healthcare to manage your disease.  What a difference!  Worth every penny!  And, a real bargain for what you get!

reviews.name: places/ChIJkWLz_h13K4cR0VIQ-8-EmeU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210MWVXaGtRMU56WDBOUVpXaG1jUzExVEZSbVVtYxAB
reviews.text:
This was a very disappointing experience. I had an appointment scheduled for today, but my lab test results were not ready yet. I explained this in advance and was told to still come in, pay for the visit, then return in two weeks and pay again just to review the results.

I contacted the lab directly, and they explained that the doctor or medical assistant could easily call or fax to obtain the results. Unfortunately, no one at the office made any effort to do this. They were not even present or willing to help coordinate the information.

I genuinely do not understand how a thyroid condition can be evaluated without blood test results. When I raised this concern, I was simply told I still needed to pay the fee regardless. There was no attempt to offer a solution or prioritize patient care—only payment.

What was most frustrating is that a solution existed, but the office chose not to use it. Instead, I was told that if I did not attend the appointment, I would still be charged. This experience made me feel that money mattered more than helping patients.

Very disappointing and not patient-centered care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkWLz_h13K4cR0VIQ-8-EmeU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xJelExbElTalJ2YjBKclpTMVRTR0Z2WVVaVlFsRRAB
reviews.text:
The front desk is friendly, and well organized when I come in for my weekly appointment.  Ty has helped me quite a bit over the years and always goes above and beyond.
Ivana is the medical assistant I see most often and I can’t say enough about how much she cares.
Meagan Gruwell & Christine Santos are both knowledgeable and patient as I tend to ask a lot of questions.  Highly recommend this practice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkWLz_h13K4cR0VIQ-8-EmeU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKTVQzSTRWbWRFT0RRNGJXeHZUazFMZGxsSE5rRRAB
reviews.text:
I began going to EDLC a little over two months ago and had to terminate my relationship with Brianne today.

Throughout my visits, Brianne demonstrated poor bedside manner, limited clinical confidence, and inconsistent follow-through, including failing to order or provide requested lab work. Despite multiple requests for printed labs so I could actively manage my own health, she never had them available and responded dismissively, often implying that my involvement was unnecessary.

The final issue occurred today when the office called to say she decided to work from home and wanted to convert my in-person appointment into a surprise telemedicine visit. There was no emergency or prior discussion. It was simply her preference. That is unacceptable. Patient care and basic professionalism should come first.

Overall, Brianne lacks empathy, attentiveness to patient needs, and clinical rigor. I would not recommend this practice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkWLz_h13K4cR0VIQ-8-EmeU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poWFFUbFZTemRSYm1vMFh6SXRaRGhtZEhsT1psRRAB
reviews.text:
Even though my insurance made receiving appropriate services tricky, the staff persisted and I was able to have my care at EDLC  covered. I am also appreciative of their telephone appointments, advice, and support, especially from Leeanna whose caring attitude always comes through.
Most of all, I feel great and am looking forward to continuing care in the future!

reviews.text:
I just want to share how great my experience has been at Gameday Health. I came in because I’d been struggling with fatigue and muscle loss, and honestly, I wasn’t sure what to expect at first. I read the reviews and they were amazing, so I decided to give it a shot—and I’m so glad I did.

When I showed up, Parker, Colton, and Jessica were all incredibly helpful and welcoming. They did my labs right away (which was awesome because I didn’t have to wait around forever), and I got my results back quickly. That’s how I found out my testosterone levels were actually low.

Now I’m about a month in, and I can honestly say it’s the best decision I’ve made for my health in a long time. I’m already feeling so much better. If you’re a guy dealing with fatigue or suspect you have hormone imbalance, don’t wait around. Just go to Gameday Health—they’ll take care of you. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJz9hZ3AoLK4cRuxOhu7VEs2Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pnMVYwVkJOM0JwTm1sb05FaHVORkZ5VTJaQk9XYxAB
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience at Innate Healthcare Institute. The entire staff was friendly, courteous, and professional—from the front desk to the phlebotomists, Angela and Jack, and especially Yasmin Jimenez, the medical aesthetician, who is very caring and simply amazing.

I received hair restoration treatments as well as a series of facial microneedling treatments with PRP, all of which yielded excellent results. Yasmin and Dr. Whitney were especially patient and conscientious, going above and beyond to ensure my treatments achieved optimal results.

The office is very clean, and sanitation standards are clearly a top priority. I highly recommend this practice and will definitely be returning!

reviews.name: places/ChIJz9hZ3AoLK4cRuxOhu7VEs2Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxV1dWSk1XRTFrYkVkamJUWldUekpHV0RGbGIxRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Ashley has been an absolute gift to our family. She oversees Tucker’s stem cell therapy and is incredibly thorough when it comes to reviewing his results, explaining what they mean, and thoughtfully recommending next steps in his treatment plan. I never feel rushed or brushed off. She takes the time to truly look at the whole picture and treats Tucker like an individual, not a protocol. She is also exceptionally responsive when questions come up, which as a parent means everything. On top of her clinical expertise, she is genuinely kind, compassionate, and supportive, which makes navigating complex care feel so much less overwhelming. We have had a wonderful experience with Innate, and I cannot recommend Dr. Ashley highly enough. 10 out of 10 recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz9hZ3AoLK4cRuxOhu7VEs2Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGaWJVMXVlbTUzU2tSaVdGUlVZV1JuV1hwVFVsRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Miriam and her team was god sent to our family. We had the stem cells treatments for my son and are still in contact with the clinic to tend to his GI needs. Dr. Miriam and her team are so kind and understanding. They truly care and SO KNOWLEDGEABLE. I truly appreciate all her help and hope to continue making her a part of our journey. I truly hope more families find Innate.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz9hZ3AoLK4cRuxOhu7VEs2Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCaFZIRXpUV3c1U0hGWVlUTTNTVk5qYzJ3dFowRRAB
reviews.text:
I want to share our family’s experience with Innate Medical Clinic. Our son has autism, and after receiving stem cell therapy through Innate Medical, we saw meaningful improvements that made a real difference in his day-to-day life. We also sought care because he had a degenerative eye condition, and following treatment we observed clear improvement in his eyes.

What stood out to us was not only the change we saw clinically and functionally, but also the visual evidence—his before-and-after photos of his eyes show a noticeable improvement. Throughout the process, the team was professional, responsive, and supportive, and they took the time to explain the steps and answer our questions.

Every patient’s journey is different, but based on our experience, I am very grateful for the care Innate Medical provided and would recommend them to families exploring options.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz9hZ3AoLK4cRuxOhu7VEs2Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5YUxUZFlhVGhuT1dWNWVHeGxiSHBxYjI1eVNFRRAB
reviews.text:
We’ve taken my grandson to Innate Health Care in Scottsdale for two treatments so far, and I cannot say enough positive things. The entire team is incredibly friendly, warm, and welcoming — you never feel like just a number here.

What really stands out is that they don’t just do a stem cell treatment and send you on your way. They follow up. They monitor. They support. They run testing, they provide supplement guidance, and they track behavior changes and progress over time — which is so important for families like ours.

They genuinely care about helping children with autism, and you can feel that in every visit and every conversation. We are very grateful for the attention, compassion, and hope they’ve given our family.

Their clinic is  warm, comfortable, and feels welcoming the moment you step inside.

If you are looking for a place that combines cutting-edge treatments with true heart and follow-through — Innate Health Care is absolutely worth it.

reviews.text: Beautiful place to go too! They take good care of you, they really do care about you! They feel exactly the way I do. I won't come back until Allison is back working. Thank you Allison for taking good care of me and caring enough to stay with me as long as you could.

reviews.name: places/ChIJf8eW4Yp1K4cRbBC6B4Kal58/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcElPWnZBRRAB
reviews.text:
I’m so glad I reached out to Lifestyle Health! I reached out to Allison Sommers NP and Ashley Powell NP wanting a true qualified professional to balance my testosterone replacement therapy and get me dialed in.
She has done an excellent job of this and in addition she has discovered a serious thyroid issue, and changed my life completely with her very in depth and comprehensive process.
She spends so much time with her patients and does an excellent job taking concierge healthcare to an even higher level than the name implies.

reviews.name: places/ChIJf8eW4Yp1K4cRbBC6B4Kal58/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZdjU3WFdREAE
reviews.text: One day I'm sitting at a local coffee shop completely in tears over the pain I was dealing with in my lower back.  When an individual noticed me and asked if I was okay. We started talking about each of our disabilities when he mentioned the person that helped him Allison Sommers with Lifestyle Health.  I kinda shrugged and thanked him for the information and went about my day.  Since I had already been with my current doctor for 8 years, I was concerned with starting all over again.  However, I had been considering a change because of the constant med changes and the reducing of my current medications, specialists treating us like a pariah or some type of a drug addict and our illustrious Governor passing laws because he knows what's good for us. (Okay no more ranting :-)  )  I was truly at wits end! So I reached out to Allison and made an appointment.  Over these past short months, Ms. Sommers has completely changed my life and given me hope towards the future.  I have been in and out of pain management for over 15 years.  Over that time I have had my fair share of horrible experiences with doctors that simply did not care about my specific disability or how to treat it.  That has all changed since I have been working with Allison.  She listens to me! ( I know unheard of right?!) Not only does she listen, she allows me to be an active participant in my treatment plan.  For the first time ever I actually feel hopeful that I will no longer experience long term pain and for the first time, I can honestly say that I function on a daily basis without my friend pain standing at the forefront of my life.  Allison has given me my life back and I know she can do the same for you.  If you're looking for a pain specialist that will give you options, listen to your concerns and work with you to find a solution that works, Ms. Sommers is that person.  I would highly suggest you stop looking for another specialist.  I've been there and done that for 15 plus years and have finally found the absolute BEST Pain Specialist EVER!  Pick up that phone and call Ms. Sommers.  I can promise that you will not be disappointed.  She is, (in my mind,) a miracle worker.  So make that call and find your way to a far happier you.  Start with that first call.  You find what I already have; your smile again!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJf8eW4Yp1K4cRbBC6B4Kal58/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJcF83VUhBEAE
reviews.text:
I have a autoimmune disorder as well as severe pain due to degenerative disks, stenosis,arthritis and sciatica. I have been to more Drs than I can count  including sports medicine, rheumatology, pain management, you name it... with out any relief. When I was referred to Dr. Sommers a year ago, I was at a loss and had kinda given in to the thinking all Drs were the same. Look at my condition and either 1- try to do as many  of the same procedures I've already tried without any benefits, and dont focus on the actual pain I'm in. Or #2 dont listen to a word I say as far as how I feel or my concerns about what's happening in my body and with my pain levels and already have their "diagnosis" before they've seen me. Or #3 assume because I unfortunately  am a chronic pain patient due to my immune condition , that I'm a drug seeker.....without looking at my records.
I CAN TRULY SAY Dr Sommers is 100% different than any doctor I've seen in the past decade! She first called my cell phone to ask how I was doing and speak to me before I ever had my first appointment with her!! She took as long as needed hearing my concerns, looking at my body as a whole, and coming up with a treatment plan actually based on me! Refreshing! She has taken time on weekends, nights, literally has given me her absolute 100% attention. finally my pain has now been reduced, I dont have to wait in the doctor's office for an hour to only be seen for 5 min. You go to your appointment, she takes you back immediately, listens and HELPS!
I WOULD RECOMMEND Dr. Sommers to any patient whether it's for pain, hormones, or just as an overall great physician. She is very smart and knows about  techniques you'd never hear from another doctor.
Thank you doctor Sommers, for helping me when no one else could and giving me dignity and the time you've spent on my health and reducing my pain.

reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Dr Sommers for over a year now and am extremely pleased with her quality of care. She helped get back to doing the things I love after being injured. Everyone in the office is very friendly and I would highly recommend lifestyle health to everyone

reviews.name: places/ChIJOTms9NJ1K4cRSaIVNfsDIQQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xNMGNFdEdjRlp1YnpWME5XOXRVblYxTTJacVJIYxAB
reviews.text: I do regret that I am not able to leave less than one star for Lifestyle Men’s Clinic  My experience with this practice has in every way been a disappointment. These clinics are actually run by a a Nurse Practitioner, not an MD. On their website and in person, they make the claim of “over 88% a success rate” however, when I asked for the data to confirm this “success”, I received no response. Upon further investigation of this pseudo science I have now had stem cell therapy described by top rated urologist as “at best useless and at worse a scam preying vulnerable on desperate men” my personal experience with the team was being charged over $14,500 for two treatments, additional medication and “supplements I have received absolutely ZERO benefit. I have communicated this with the practice numerous times with zero resolution. In summary, As a patient who has suffered with this condition, I strongly recommend that you don’t waste your precious time and money with this clinic. Stick with proven medical treatments and avoid untested magic solutions.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOTms9NJ1K4cRSaIVNfsDIQQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWZk5HdDNWMTlSWm1oUVowNXhTSFZ5ZDJveloyYxAB
reviews.text: The staggering at Lifestyle Mens Clinic got me in for an appointment very quickly that worked with my schedule.  Patient Coordinator Ken explained the process to me in a comfortable atmosphere and even told me that he was also a patient.  That actually contributed to my confidence about their regimen.  At my followup with Dr. Angela Petersen explained in more detail what the process was and how long it would take. I have had 10 spinal surgeries in the last 6 years which, I believe contributed greatly to my overall issues. Dr. Angela answered my questions and I did not feel she oversold the effects of the treatments but gave me a real world, honest assessment of  my prognosis that I felt confident enough to begin the level 2 treatment later this month. All the staff like Reagan are very understanding of not just the physical but psychological stresses that accompany conditions like ED and the related issues that affect mens lives. I look forward to the final results which I feel will restore some of my confidence and dignity.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg0O6uL91K4cRvbLcNX9SUtg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkcFNUTm9NMUJZUkZjMVgwTm5Xa2hVVlVOaU4zYxAB
reviews.text:
For months, I felt exhausted all the time. I had constant brain fog, wasn’t sleeping well, and just didn’t feel like myself. I went to my PCP several times and had three separate rounds of labs done. Every time I was told, “Everything looks normal. You’re just getting older.” I’m 39, and that answer didn’t sit well with me.

I started doing my own research and decided to book an appointment at Modern Therapeutics. Honestly, it was one of the best decisions I’ve made for my health.

I met with Jessie, and after going over my symptoms, he said right away that it sounded like low testosterone. He drew my blood that day, and I had results back the next morning. Sure enough, my testosterone was very low, lower than I expected.

What I appreciated most was how straightforward and supportive the process was. Jessie got me started on a treatment plan immediately and took the time to walk me through everything, including how to inject, where to inject, and what to expect. I left feeling informed and confident, not overwhelmed.

We retested after a month to make sure the dosage was right for me, which I think is so important since everyone responds differently. Within about two weeks, my brain fog started lifting and I was finally sleeping through the night again.

I’m now four months into TRT, and I can honestly say I feel better than I have in years. I have more energy, clearer thinking, and better sleep. It has made a huge difference in my day-to-day life.

If you feel like something is off and you are not getting real answers, I highly recommend Modern Therapeutics. They truly listen and work with you to figure out what is going on.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg0O6uL91K4cRvbLcNX9SUtg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsbDdmR0pREAE
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting Modern Therapeutics for a second time, and I must say it was just as a fantastic experience as my first visit. Jesse, who handled my IV, was exceptionally professional and skilled. The office itself has a calming and welcoming ambiance, unlike the typical medical environment.

reviews.text: I live in Scottsdale and had been feeling drained for months — no energy in the mornings, constant brain fog, and zero motivation to work out. From the first appointment, I could tell they truly cared. They ordered comprehensive labs, walked me through my results, and explained exactly why I was feeling this way. My provider built a custom TRT plan just for me, and within weeks I noticed the difference — more energy, improved workouts, better mood, and deeper sleep. The Scottsdale clinic is professional, modern, and easy to get to. The staff makes you feel comfortable and supported every step of the way. If you live in Scottsdale or the greater Phoenix area and need help with low testosterone or hormone balancing, this is the place to go.

reviews.text: MultiGen Wellness in Scottsdale provides the most thorough and personalized hormone therapy I’ve ever experienced. reviews.name: places/ChIJZ3BAmwufK4cRuKTBU4TIe_k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWemQwcDNkMnhTU1ZZNVFqUjNPRlJZVkhSUFRIYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Nancy at Scottsdale Health provides exceptional, heart-centered care that is truly hard to find. Her blend of deep clinical knowledge and genuine compassion creates a level of trust and confidence that made my first two visits a positive experience. From the moment I walked into her office, the atmosphere was welcoming and peaceful, and the team reflects the same professionalism and kindness that Dr. Nancy models. She is extremely responsive, follows up promptly, and makes sure questions are answered so you never feel rushed or overlooked.

Her support with weight loss management has been outstanding; she offers practical, personalized plans and consistent encouragement that make goals feel achievable instead of overwhelming. Dr. Nancy goes above and beyond to really listen to what my needs are so she can adjust treatment to fit me as an individual.  I can already tell she has a vested interest in celebrating my progress and successes, and has already ensured that i feel supported every step of the way on my health journey. What stands out most is her integrative approach: Dr. Nancy is skilled in both traditional medical care and innovative wellness therapies, so you never feel pushed into a one-size-fits-all solution. Whether it is routine primary care, hormone balance, IV therapy, or long-term weight management, she is thorough, thoughtful, and truly invested in your success.

If you are looking for a provider who is knowledgeable, attentive, responsive, and genuinely committed to helping you ‘live your best life now, Dr. Nancy is at  Scottsdale Health is highly recommended!

reviews.name: places/ChIJZ3BAmwufK4cRuKTBU4TIe_k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1TlJtWXRXRGhNZFRFeVFrRlBRWE5WVTA5b1YyYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Nancy is the embodiment of what patients dream of! 3 things stood out most during our initial visit.

1. I provided an overview of my medical history and asked a few questions about prior advice along the way. By the end of the discussion, from her hand written notes, Dr. Nancy recounted EVERY SINGLE thing I said. This was a high level of attentiveness which mattered as many doctors only listen partially and miss details that are needed for quality care.

2. During the exam, Dr. Nancy took her time! She reeducated me on the body's digestive functions in such great detail that I feel so prepared for my next anatomy exam should I ever be assigned one!

3. Her compassion for her patients and her passion about what she does should be bottled up and distributed to other Doctors in AZ! I've never experienced a Doctor who didn't push medication and instead, understood that our words have power and God has provided everything we need to heal.

This was a life impacting appointment and I've already recommended others to her practice. I'd be remiss to not mention Priscilla who partners here. She is one of the most spiritually and energetically talented individuals that I've ever encountered! The practice they've curated of mind, body and soul treatment rooted in the Most High, makes me grateful that I've found them!

reviews.text: This was the most personalized visit with a doctor I have ever had. Dr. Nancy, not only listened in-depth , but she took a whole body healing  approach to all my concerns. This is the kind of health professional I need. If you are looking for a doctor that will educate and sit down and talk to you about your care,  she’s the one. She brings a human experience along with a lot of knowledge. I look forward to continuing my care with her.

reviews.text:
I'm really blessed to have met Dr. Clark back in 2020. Originally I came to him for prp on my ankle to treat a high ankle sprain which yielded phenomenal results.

Fast forward 5 years later, I started seeing Dr. Clark in February of this year, and had another transformative experience.

After completing my bloodwork, he recommended a personalized vitamin regimen along with enclomiphene.
With his guidance, I lost 25 pounds in the first three months. That early progress gave me the motivation and discipline to stay consistent, and over the next three months I lost another 15 pounds.

Dr. Clark’s clear explanations, support, and individualized approach have made a huge difference in my overall health. I even have a scheduled visit with him soon to discuss adding peptides to my plan, which I’m excited about as the next step in my journey.

I feel healthier, more confident, and finally in control of my weight-loss progress. I’m incredibly grateful for Dr. Clark and highly recommend him to anyone looking for real, sustainable results.

The following is my photo progress! From 220 > 195 > 180
