reviews.name: places/ChIJXy4aa4xFK4cRp0ifQJlSM1k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ob1FYcEpWR3haVUdWTExXUnNkWEpoWnpoNE1VRRAB
reviews.text:
I wish I could give this place 0 STARS after my last experience.

I rarely write negative reviews because it truly takes a lot to upset me. I consider myself very easygoing. However, after multiple visits and ongoing concerns, I feel obligated to share my experience and warn others to do their research before coming here.

I originally decided to try this clinic because of the heavy advertising I saw on Facebook and Instagram, even though I noticed a few red flags early on. This is a men’s health clinic focused on testosterone, yet it appears to be staffed entirely by women. While that may not matter to some, I personally expected at least one male provider or specialist in a clinic centered around men’s hormone health.

I paid $250 for blood work and $210 for a 30-day supply of medication. I gave the program a fair chance and continued treatment for three months. During that time, I saw no noticeable changes in my body. I work out daily (30–45 minutes of cardio plus weightlifting), and I follow a very clean diet. I am not overweight, yet after three months, I looked and felt exactly the same.

Another issue was the weight discrepancies. Every time I visited, their scale showed me at 196 lbs. I weigh myself every morning at home and consistently range between 186–187 lbs. Even my gym scale confirms this. When I mentioned the difference, I was told that “a lot of people complain about the scale.” When I brought it up again, I was told that even a sip of water can increase weight — but an 8–10 lb difference is not realistic. This response felt dismissive rather than professional.

The final visit was the most concerning. During my blood draw, two small tubes were taken. I was then told another tube was needed, and instead of waiting, blood was immediately drawn from my other arm. Shortly after, I fainted. I was disoriented for about 25–30 minutes and genuinely scared. I’ve had blood drawn many times in my life and have never experienced anything like this.

After I got home, I contacted my primary doctor, who expressed serious concern about how the situation was handled. From what I understand, if a patient reacts poorly during a blood draw, there should be caution and proper protocol before attempting another draw.

Overall, this experience left me feeling unsafe, unheard, and disappointed especially considering the cost. Please do your research before choosing this clinic. In today’s world, many businesses are opening quickly, but not all of them operate with the professionalism and care patients deserve.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXy4aa4xFK4cRp0ifQJlSM1k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCYU9VZFZObVJQUWxoUFRERk9TMDR6ZVVoR1ZVRRAB

reviews.text:
Megan is the Coolest Nurse on Planet Earth”

If being a nurse were a competitive sport, she’d be undefeated. I came in expecting the usual clinic vibe, but nope she showed up like a hype man, a therapist, and a stand-up comedian all in one.

She took my vitals so smoothly I didn’t even realize I still had vitals. Her shots? Didn’t feel a thing. Not sure if she used a needle or Jedi mind tricks.

10/10 bedside manner.
12/10 personality.
∞/10 cool points.

If you ever need someone to take care of you and roast you lovingly at the same time, this is your nurse.

Highly recommend but be warned: once she’s your nurse, all other nurses will feel like the “Walmart version.” 😄

reviews.text:
I’ve been a patient here for a little over 10 months now and I must say, Ageless Men’s Health Tempe is truly a stand out establishment when it comes to men’s health and wellness. From the moment you walk in the team is always so professional, knowledgeable, and invested in helping you feel your very best!!  The entire process, consultations,  treatments, and follow ups, is efficient, seamless and 100% tailored to your specific needs.

But what truly makes this location exceptional is the people!!  Their commitment to their customers, is reflected in the people who all work there, and no one embodies it more than Lindsey!

Lindsey has a genuine way of brightening my day no matter how hectic things are. Whether it’s answering my health questions or making sure I’m comfortable (I hate needles), or just bringing an incredible energy to the office, Lindsey makes the experience exceptional every time. It’s rare to find someone who combines clinical expertise, kindness, and a true passion for helping others, the way she does.

Ageless men’s health is lucky to have her, and so are the patients who get to interact with her. If every business had a Lindsey, the world would be a better place.

I’m very grateful to have found Ageless Mens Health when I did, I truly feel it’s had a profound impact on my life, and can’t thank the team enough for all they’ve done for me.

Highly Highly Recommend!  5 stars!

reviews.text: I won’t be coming back to this location. I work in construction, and it always difficult for me to get to these and Mens Vitality facility before closing time at 5pm. Now I understand that at the end of the day, everyone is ready to close up shop and head home. But what’s the point in saying your closing time is at 5pm if you’re going to close prior to that?! reviews.name: places/ChIJZQjL1CoHK4cRhoKOBCIP3yI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toUFQxWlFlSGd6TW5keU5TMUphalZWYVVwS2VVRRAB
reviews.text:
I was hoping to avoid writing a negative review, but after being a patient of Dr. Smithers for 5 years (since April of 2020), I’ve also been ghosted by her with no explanation as another review states. I wonder how many others have also had this experience recently.

While I won’t rate her treatment plans and work with me one star, it’s always been phenomenal. But finding a doctor who you trust to only be abandoned with no explanation leaves a very bitter taste. Her recent complete lack of communication and abandonment is why this is a one star review, especially as a woman less than 6 months postpartum.

Timeline of communication/abandonment:

3/13 - email that I’m out of medication and questions about breastfeeding safe supps.

3/14 - Dr. Smithers replies and tells me to have my pharmacy fax her my refill request. I reply and tell her she sent me my thyroid meds.

3/19 - Dr. Smithers replies and says she’s been sending the Rx to a pharmacy and asks how much supply I have. She also asks if she can run the card on file for my supps.

3/21 - I reply I have no supply left, and to run the card on file.

4/10 - I follow up because my card was never run and realized I hadn’t heard back. NO REPLY

5/22 - I call and she texts immediately asking how she can help. I text back that I’m glad she’s okay because I thought something happened with her lack of communication. She never replies back.

5/28 - Email Dr. Smithers and her assistant. No response.

It is difficult to find a doctor to trust with your health, especially as a woman. I planned to work with Dr. Smithers as long as she was in practice. Now, that is not the case. If you are a current patient I hope this doesn’t happen to you. If you are seeking treatment, be cautious. It would take a lot of me to work with Dr. Smithers again as I’ve lost complete trust in her to care about my health and well being.

reviews.name: places/ChIJZQjL1CoHK4cRhoKOBCIP3yI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwTVdrMW5SVzVCV1RsM1NURkNhVFpRTWxZNVZYYxAB
reviews.text: I can’t recommend her enough! From the moment I walked in, she made me feel completely comfortable and truly heard. She’s incredibly kind, friendly, and knowledgeable. It’s clear she genuinely cares and takes the time to understand what’s going on. I felt supported every step of the way—and best of all, I feel so much better on the treatment she recommended.

reviews.name: places/ChIJZQjL1CoHK4cRhoKOBCIP3yI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGNk0wRldTbWN5Y1VGSVRHTktURTVoU0d4aWJIYxAB
reviews.text:
I was a patient here for almost 4 years. For the first 2-3 years, things were great. She was attentive, responsive, & I felt like the care I was receiving was worth the amount of money I was paying (out of pocket, btw).  I referred my mom, sister, husband, & daughter to her as a result.  I would tell anyone & everyone about how much she was helping me & I would encourage them to go get their labs drawn. I never received any thank you or referral discount from her. It was not expected, but it would have been a nice gesture.  Over these 3 years, I have paid Dr Smithers thousands of dollars for follow ups, supporting her & purchasing her supplement (Restore), bloodwork, food sensitivity panels, etc.

Over the last year or so, things have gone downhill.  My last blood draw was in Feb 2025, Kim showed up & asked me for the lab order. I hadn’t received anything & Dr Smithers hadn’t sent her what she needed either.  Thankfully, Kim had been drawing my blood for several years, so she knew what we typically do, & she was able to just guess.  Dr Smithers is ON TOP OF IT when it comes to charging you for your appts, labs, supplements, etc. But when it comes to doing the work that comes along with it, she has been incredibly neglectful.

My last appt was canceled bc her in-law’s dog was put down & she was upset. I am a dog lover & would be very understanding of this, on a regular day. The problem was that she used this exact same excuse to cancel my sister’s appt, several weeks prior.  I’ll give the benefit of the doubt here & say they had 2 dogs. But putting a dog down isn’t typically something that comes up out of nowhere. Once, maybe... but twice within a few weeks? If she knew this was happening, she should’ve canceled the appts ahead of time.  If we cancel that close to the appt time, we’re charged. But she can just cancel constantly, & offer no compensation for it, & we’re just supposed to say OK, no problem? In addition to the constant cancelations, she NEVER replies to emails in a timely manner. My sister had an appt in Oct 2024 & needed more supplements. She emailed for MONTHS. I then had to start emailing & ask why she wasn’t getting back to my sister. She didn’t get back to us or send my sister her supplements until Feb 2025. That’s 4 months after her blood draw/follow up appt. By then, things could’ve changed drastically! My mother also had her last appt canceled right before it was set to begin. She continues to have issues getting responses re: supplement refills and medical forms.

I don’t think she even has an office phone that is monitored bc if you do find a phone number to call, no one answers. No one will ever call you, everything is done via email/text & then you have to wait weeks, if not months, for a response.  Throughout all of this – I would see Dr Smithers posting on Instagram, soliciting for new patients! She can’t manage the patients she has, yet she’s trying to take on more?

This was the final straw, & it was my own fault bc I should’ve known better at this point.  But despite my better judgment, I scheduled a consult for my daughter. I had to pay $365 for this appt. I knew that Dr Smithers would cancel 10 minutes before, so I made sure to tell her to keep an eye on her phone prior to the appt. Sure enough – she canceled bc of a “flat tire”. She “did us a favor” & fit her in at 9 the next morning, even though it was a Saturday. She ended up spending 19 minutes on the phone. I paid for a 60 min consult.  Since I’ve been a patient for so many years, & I referred so many people... AND, the initial appt was canceled at the last minute… I figured I would reach out to see if Dr Smithers would credit me that 40 minutes. I sent her 3 emails over 2-3 weeks - no response.  In these emails, I also requested that she send me or Kim a copy of the lab order since her blood draw was already scheduled. The blood draw came & went, no response. She didn’t send anything to Kim either, even though she also reached out.

*continued in photos since there is a limit here*

reviews.text:
Dajjesa has been a complete game changer!!! David and Jannine are amazing to work with in all things health optimization and do not try to push any unnecessary services on their patients. They are super accommodating to working professionals and make it stress-free when it comes to receiving care.

If you are struggling with your current provider or new to the process, do not hesitate for a second about reaching out to Dajjesa. You will not regret it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJWRLxuCIRSmwR2eKYQURRHWI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWTVpXOHdUM1E1VkVoM2QwbHFOM0ZEVm1kdFJYYxAB
reviews.text:
I feel incredibly fortunate to have found Dajjesa after multiple disappointing experiences with other urologists. For nearly a year, my previous physician made me feel more like an inconvenience than a patient. That all changed when I met Dr. Kerr and Jannine.

From the very first visit, Dr. Kerr truly listened, showed genuine care, and clearly explained both the process and his goals for improving my health. My initial lab work showed my testosterone levels in the low 100s. After a few months of treatment, my levels are now in the 800s—and more importantly, I finally feel the way I should.

I cannot say enough great things about Dr. Kerr, Jannine, and the entire team at Dajjesa. They are compassionate, knowledgeable, and truly invested in their patients’ well-being. You’re treated like family, not just a number. Thank you all for your outstanding care and continued support!

reviews.text: David and his wife have been amazing. They offer first class services, always responsive, and know what they’re talking about. Their services are affordable and because of them I feel better. I’m getting stronger, healthier, and I’m able to be more successful at work and a better father.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0ZD8KYdx1oYRJY1TOyVuPzg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZME9UdFNREAE
reviews.text:
I visited this place in early January. It appears to be their policy to charge new patients—even insured patients—the full cost of a visit ($260 at the time I went) regardless of the discount negotiated with your insurance.

I was told that the difference would be refunded to me once they had an explanation of benefits from the insurer. After several weeks passed, I called and asked again about the refund of the difference (about $110 in my case): Would it be refunded to the credit card? Would it be held in account to apply against future visits?

The woman I spoke to said that there is no one in the office who understands how the insurance discount works and they could not help me.

No in the office understands how negotiated insurance discounts work! Their words.

Instead, she suggested I email the owner of the business and gave me an email address. Okay, this is very strange, but fine, I emailed the owner. Three days have passed with no reply.

I can't say I am surprised.

I now suspect that this business intentionally over-charges new patients the full cost of a visit, despite insurance discounts, and simply hopes that customers will now bother to collect their refund.

I will say, the nurse that saw me way very nice and seemed competent (I'll also mention I was not told when I booked the appointment that I'd be seeing a nurse; I specifically made an appointment to see Dr Evans) and that the staff I spoke to were polite. Unfortunately, that doesn't make up for their awful business practice.

I will not be returning (as a patient) to this place.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0ZD8KYdx1oYRJY1TOyVuPzg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeUwyOFBnEAE
reviews.text: My PCP, James, goes above and beyond. Have not had to wait long ever to get an appointment.  And then appointments happen on time or very close... that never has happened for me elsewhere. James spent 30 minutes even just discussing results and answering questions during my annual.  He really cares and really looks after his patients. Try finding any of that at other doctor's offices - there you are just a number, here you are a valued patient.  I highly highly recommend them for primary care and more.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0ZD8KYdx1oYRJY1TOyVuPzg/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBckpIbHBRRRAB
reviews.text: Since I started going here I have received nothing but the best treatment. When Dr. Freeman left I thought that was the end of this experience. However the doctor who replaced him.has filled his shoes very nicely. The staff is wonderful very inviting and up tempo. My favorite MA is Jessica always attentive and on the ball with any and everything I have asked her.  I would recommend this clinic over and over to any of my male friends and co workers.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0ZD8KYdx1oYRJY1TOyVuPzg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbHFDV1B3EAE
reviews.text:
I  was in need of a full physical in order to meet a tight deadline for a foreign travel visa.  I called and visited my clinics in Tucson and could not find a doctor who was familiar with foreign travel visa requirements.  The closest clinic I could find was a 2-hour drive and 3 week waiting list in Phoenix.  I then received a call from Dr. Freemans staff at the Men's Vitality center, I had sent off numerous inquiries the night before seeking help.  I was reassured that Dr. Freeman was extremely well versed in foreign visa travel requirements!  I was giving a very quick appointment and after meeting Dr. Freeman I was reassured that he could and would meet any deadlines I had with my pending travel!
After completing all the needed labs and physical, I received a personal call from Dr. Freeman informing me that my packet was ready.
Extreme professionalism and unsurpassed knowledge!  Thank you to Dr. Freeman and his staff for all the hard work!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0ZD8KYdx1oYRJY1TOyVuPzg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnei1lTFV3EAE
reviews.text: I can't recommend Dr. Freeman enough. I've had extremely poor experiences with every other doctor I have visited in Tucson - waiting months for a physical, or weeks for a visit, being rushed out the door or offered an impersonal and unsatisfactory level of care. Dr. Freeman is the first doctor I have had who provides top-level care with extremely personable bedside manner, and he always sees me in a timely manner and ensures my healthcare needs are met. Seriously the best doctor I have found across the 4 states I've lived in.

reviews.text: I love this clinic! It’s truly been life-changing — they’ve helped me reach my goals and feel better than ever. reviews.name: places/ChIJ3XL4lKpv1oYRkAN8Si1jPuo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURULTd2QjNRRRAB
reviews.text:
I want to express my gratitude to Mr. Burnett and the entire staff for their knowledge, friendliness, and support throughout my weight loss journey, which I prefer to call my lifestyle change. When I first sought help, I weighed 320 lbs and suffered from sleep apnea and hypertension. I knew I had to step out of my comfort zone and seek assistance.

During my evaluation and discussion of my lab results, Mr. Burnett was amazing. After addressing all the issues, he initiated a treatment plan for me, which began near the end of October 2023. Since then, I have lost 100 lbs and no longer suffer from hypertension or sleep apnea.

The treatment, combined with improved eating habits, sticking to a workout routine, and becoming more active every day, has significantly improved my health.

I would recommend the The LowT Clinic to anyone.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3XL4lKpv1oYRkAN8Si1jPuo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUanJyblJnEAE
reviews.text:
I had lap band surgery a few years ago.  I’m a stress eater and regained all the weight lost.  I was at the end of my sanity until I was recommended to the Low T Clinic.  The staff there took me under their wing and with my new meds and advice from them, I went from 225 lbs to 163 lbs.  I have 30 more pounds till I’m at my goal weight.

I haven’t felt this positive about myself in a long, long time.  They spend as much time as you need.  You are never rushed out.  The positivity is the air as soon as you walk through the door.

I would certainly recommend everyone to go to the Low T Clinic.  You will be very happy you did.  Tell them I sent you! 😀

Betsy Finley

reviews.name: places/ChIJCwMDz0tz1oYRbAmUtYhv81Y/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURScTlTUWpnRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Piercecchi is an absolute master of his craft and the utmost professional in terms of communication and care for his patients.  After years of my primary Doc telling me I am healthy, I decided to get a deep dive into my wellness with a full lab panel from Dr. Piercecchi, as he is able to order and perform significantly more advanced blood testing than your ordinary primary care.  Come to find out, I have a very high reading on one of my lipo proteins, which requires careful and continuous monitoring.  Dr. Piercecchi was able to quickly get me referred to see a specialist in Phoenix, and has been guiding me step by step along the way with the most outstanding communication.  After taking two weeks to read and learn about my condition, I am 100% certain Dr. Piercecchi and his advance approach to medicine is the only Dr. in Tucson who would of been able to diagnose the issue.  Since the high lab result, I have done extensive reading and research on my own and everything I have read has 100% confirmed all the treatment I have received from Dr. Piercecchi.  No matter your age and current health situation, I HIGHLY recommend at minimum a full wellness panel workup at the Men's Clinic for Wellness.
